phases.name: Phase 1 - Legacy Code Integration
phases.description: Scan and maintain existing codebase modules
phases.notes: Completed Phase 1. Cleaned up all duplicate functions/ directories and legacy documentation root files. Set up proper docs/ subdirectories. Verified typechecks and code compilation. Added robust error boundaries to the IDE workspace panel integrations.

phases.name: Phase 2 - Security Hardening & Testing Setup
phases.description: Implement route-level auth protection, resolve security vulnerabilities (JWT, RLS, role escalation), and set up the unit/integration testing pipelines.
